meta.notes: ACS 2024 1-year SDOH indicators — all 15 indicators, 51 states + D.C., validated against PA State Data Center release

median_household_income.label: Median Household Income
median_household_income.description: Median household income in the past 12 months (inflation-adjusted dollars)

poverty_rate.label: Poverty Rate
poverty_rate.description: Percent of people below poverty level

snap_receipt_rate.label: SNAP Receipt Rate
snap_receipt_rate.description: Percent of households receiving SNAP (food stamps)

hs_diploma_rate.label: High School Diploma or Higher
hs_diploma_rate.description: Percent of population 25+ with HS diploma or higher

bachelors_rate.label: Bachelor's Degree or Higher
bachelors_rate.description: Percent of population 25+ with bachelor's degree or higher

uninsured_rate.label: Uninsured Rate (Under 65)
uninsured_rate.description: Percent of civilian noninstitutionalized population under 65 without health insurance

disability_rate.label: Disability Rate
disability_rate.description: Percent of civilian noninstitutionalized population with a disability

homeownership_rate.label: Homeownership Rate
homeownership_rate.description: Percent of occupied housing units that are owner-occupied

housing_cost_burden.label: Housing Cost Burden (Renters)
housing_cost_burden.description: Percent of renters paying 30% or more of income on housing

foreign_born_pct.label: Foreign-Born Population
foreign_born_pct.description: Percent of population that is foreign-born

non_english_household_pct.label: Non-English Speaking Households
non_english_household_pct.description: Percent of households where a language other than English is spoken

single_parent_pct.label: Single-Parent Households
single_parent_pct.description: Percent of family households with a single parent

broadband_access.label: Broadband Internet Access
broadband_access.description: Percent of households with a broadband internet subscription
